'''nashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bactericidally|bactericidally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bactericidally|bactericidally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nashate|nashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nashatesher|nashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nashatesherĂ«m|nashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nashatero|nashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nashateshĂ«|nashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nashateshĂ«m|nashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinashatero|gokinashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinashateshĂ«|gokinashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinashateshĂ«m|gokinashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonashankerom|gonashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonashankeshĂ«|gonashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonashankeshĂ«m|gonashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonashankeya|gonashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nashaterom|nashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nashatemu|nashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nashateya|nashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinashaterom|gokinashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinashatemu|gokinashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinashateya|gokinashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nashashate|nashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nashashatesher|nashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nashashatesherĂ«m|nashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nashashatero|nashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nashashateshĂ«|nashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nashashateshĂ«m|nashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinashashatero|gokinashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinashashateshĂ«|gokinashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinashashateshĂ«m|gokinashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonashashankerom|gonashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonashashankeshĂ«|gonashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonashashankeshĂ«m|gonashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonashashankeya|gonashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nashashaterom|nashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nashashatemu|nashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nashashateya|nashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinashashaterom|gokinashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinashashatemu|gokinashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinashashateya|gokinashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠshĂŠte|nĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠshĂŠtesher|nĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠshĂŠtero|nĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠshĂŠtero|gokinĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠshĂŠterom|nĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠshĂŠtemu|nĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠshĂŠteya|nĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠshĂŠterom|gokinĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠshĂŠteya|gokinĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafshafte|nafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafshaftesher|nafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafshaftesherĂ«m|nafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafshaftero|nafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafshafteshĂ«|nafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafshafteshĂ«m|nafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafshaftero|gokinafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafshafteshĂ«|gokinafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafshafteshĂ«m|gokinafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafshafnkerom|gonafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafshafnkeshĂ«|gonafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafshafnkeshĂ«m|gonafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafshafnkeya|gonafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafshafterom|nafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafshaftemu|nafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafshafteya|nafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafshafterom|gokinafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafshaftemu|gokinafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafshafteya|gokinafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
